title: IdentitySignature
description: Identity-specific cryptographic signature object for the Sovereign Identity Kernel (SIK-3).

signature_id.description: Unique identifier for this identity signature.

identity_id.description: ID of the identity associated with this signature.

algorithm.description: Cryptographic algorithm used to generate the signature (e.g., Ed25519, SHA-3, RSA-4096).

public_key.description: Public key associated with the identity, if applicable.
